definition: Order blocks created by extreme displacement candles — the displacement is so strong that the OB becomes a 'propulsion zone' with exceptionally high institutional interest.
depends_on: order_blocks (propulsion blocks ARE OBs with extreme displacement)
displacement (propulsion requires extreme, not just normal displacement)
feeds_into: trade entry (propulsion blocks are highest-confidence OB entries)
related_to: order_blocks (propulsion is the STRONGEST grade of OB)
fair_value_gaps (propulsion blocks always leave large FVGs)
criteria: The displacement candle must be >2x the average candle range, with body >80% of range (almost no wick). These are institutional aggression candles.
significance: Propulsion blocks are the strongest OBs. First touch has near-90% reaction probability. If a propulsion block is mitigated without reaction, the trend thesis is WRONG.
